title: Servers Plus
description: Adds another servers page for content creators and people who want to have their servers organised.
body:
# Servers Plus

**This mod is in a very early alpha phase. If you have any new ideas and enhancements, please submit an issue on the GitHub page.**

Thank you!

---

This mod enables an additional way to organize your servers, put them in folders, choose a custom icon, name or MOTD. You can also customize the player count and the ping icon.

This is what the default config looks like in the game:

![Default Configuration](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/Vn7fLCbo/images/78473a3ed7ebe30adbe0875f01453356e092c88e.png)
